title: Conflict Resolution Output
description: Output after attempting to resolve git rebase conflicts for a ticket.

resolved.description: Whether all conflicts were successfully resolved. Set to true only after editing conflicted files, running git add on them, and running git rebase --continue.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was done to resolve the conflicts — which side was kept or how files were merged

files_changed.description: List of files that were modified to resolve conflicts

reason.description: If resolved is false, explain why the conflicts could not be resolved and what information is needed
